title: Antigravity Pants
description: Now even YOU can wear pants that remove the annoying restrictions of gravity!
body:
Adds these cool pants that allow you to disable gravity by crouching. This has some surprising effects so watch the demo to see more.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9N5_IqEPI7M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

To create the Antigravity Pants combine Iron Leggings and a Shulker Shell in a Smithing Table.
